chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appln. No.S- 437 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.3702/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag-A 3. For hearing of main case. 22.07.2025 Mr. Zahoor Ahmed Lund, Advocate along with Applicant >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that he would like to withdraw the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application and proceed before the concerned Court having jurisdiction. This Bench appreciates the Counsel’s candid submissions and expects the appropriate forum to look into the matter in accordance with the law. Accordingly the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI/PS
